references.author: Raspberry Pi Ltd
use: Approximate connector opening centres and heights for keep-out envelopes
limitations: Drawing states dimensions are approximate and not for production data
No official redistributable board STEP is published for keep-out solids
Connector envelopes are derived boxes pending physical verification

references.author: Raspberry Pi Ltd
use: Active Cooler height 13.70 mm for lid clearance keep-out
limitations: Drawing states dimensions are approximate and not for production data
Blower exhaust plume is not modelled as a separate solid
Keep-out is an axis-aligned envelope, not the finned aluminium STEP
